title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google has released TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, served via Virgo Network to enable high-throughput model serving. The video compares these application-specific integrated circuits against general-purpose GPUs and discusses scaling-up versus scaling-out strategies for LLM inference and training economics.
